ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "open_hour" INTEGER /* Opening hour of the business */,
  "close_hour" INTEGER /* Closing hour of the business */,
  "income" REAL /* Income reported by the business */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Total transaction amount reported by the business */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the business owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the business owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the business */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., retail, food service, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the business location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the business is located */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the business location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_locations" (
  "business_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business-location relationship */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_locations_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the performance record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "income" REAL /* Income for the month */,
  "transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions for the month */,
  "customer_feedback_score" REAL /* Average customer feedback score for the month */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., food service, alcohol) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., active, expired, suspended) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued by the authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership relationship */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_ownership_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES business_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_ownership_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the city official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the city official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the city official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the city official (e.g., mayor, councilor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
